Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
A inteligência artificial (IA) é uma disciplina da ciência que simula a inteligência humana utilizando algoritmos e sistemas de computação. A IA funciona através de três pilares principais:

1. Aprendizado automático: o sistema aprende de forma autônoma a identificar padrões e relacionamentos em dados grandes, sem necessidade de instruções específicas.
2. Visão artificial: o sistema é capaz de processar e interpretar imagens e vídeos, como reconhecer objetos, rostos e movimentos.
3. Linguagem natural: o sistema é capaz de entender e processar a linguagem humana, com foco em analisar textos, responder a perguntas e gerar respostas inteligentes.

A IA é utilizada em diversas áreas, como automação de processos, reconhecimento de imagens, diagnóstico de doenças, previsão de mercado, entre outras. Ela evolui constantemente, sendo desenvolvida para ser mais eficiente e precisa.

prompt:
[Respond in French]

Quelle est la différence entre le réchauffement climatique et le changement climatique?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Bien que les deux termes soient souvent utilisés de manière interchangeable dans le langage courant, il existe une distinction scientifique importante entre les deux :

### 1. Le réchauffement climatique (Global Warming)
Le réchauffement climatique désigne spécifiquement l'**augmentation de la température moyenne de la surface de la Terre** (atmosphères et océans) sur une période prolongée.

*   **Le mécanisme :** Il est principalement causé par l'augmentation des gaz à effet de serre (comme le CO2 et le méthane) dans l'atmosphère, qui retiennent la chaleur du soleil.
*   **L'indicateur :** On le mesure par des degrés Celsius (°C). C'est le moteur ou la cause principale du phénomène global.

### 2. Le changement climatique (Climate Change)
Le changement climatique est un terme beaucoup plus **vaste**. Il englobe le réchauffement climatique, mais inclut également **toutes les conséquences et les modifications des modèles météorologiques** qui en découlent.

Le changement climatique ne concerne pas seulement la chaleur, il concerne la modification de l'ensemble du système climatique. Cela inclut :
*   **Les modifications des précipitations :** Des sécheresses plus longues ou, à l'inverse, des inondations plus fréquentes.
*   **Les événements extrêmes :** L'augmentation de l'intensité et de la fréquence des ouragans, des tempêtes et des vagues de chaleur.
*   **La modification des courants marins :** Ce qui influence la météo régionale.
*   **La fonte des glaces :** L'élévation du niveau de la mer.
*   **Les changements de saison :** Des hivers plus doux ou des printemps précoces.

### En résumé :
*   Le **réchauffement climatique** est la **cause** (l'augmentation de la température).
*   Le **changement climatique** est l'**effet global** (l'ensemble des bouleversements de la météo et de l'environnement sur la planète).

On peut comparer cela à une maladie : le *réchauffement* serait la fièvre (l'augmentation de la température corporelle), tandis que le *changement climatique* serait l'ensemble des symptômes de la maladie (douleurs, fatigue, toux, etc.).

prompt:
[Respond in Portuguese]

Quais são os 5 melhores lugares para visitar em Portugal?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Escolher apenas cinco lugares em um país tão rico como Portugal é um desafio, mas aqui estão os cinco destinos que oferecem as experiências mais icônicas e diversificadas:

### 1. Lisboa (A Capital Vibrante)
Lisboa combina perfeitamente o charme histórico com uma energia moderna. É essencial para quem quer explorar bairros tradicionais como **Alfama** (com o som do Fado), passear pelo **Bairro Alto** e visitar a imponente **Torre de Belém**. A gastronomia, especialmente os famosos Pastéis de Belém, é imperdível.

### 2. Porto e Vale do Douro (Tradição e Vinho)
O Porto é uma cidade com uma alma única, famosa pela sua Ribeira à beira do Rio Douro e pelas caves de vinho do Porto. Para uma experiência completa, recomendo um passeio de barco ou de comboio pelo **Vale do Douro**, onde as encostas em socalcos criam uma das paisagens mais bonitas do mundo.

### 3. Sintra (O Cenário de Conto de Fadas)
Localizada muito perto de Lisboa, Sintra parece saída de um livro de histórias. É um Património Mundial da UNESCO repleto de palácios e castelos românticos, como o colorido **Palácio da Pena** e a misteriosa **Quinta da Regaleira**. A neblina e a floresta densa dão ao lugar um ar mágico.

### 4. Algarve (Praias e Falésias)
Se o objetivo é sol, mar e relaxamento, o Algarve é o destino ideal. A região é famosa pelas suas praias deslumbrantes emolduradas por falésias douradas, como a **Praia da Marinha** ou a famosa **Gruta de Benagil**. É perfeito tanto para quem procura vida noturna (como em Albufeira) como para quem prefere tranquilidade (como em Tavira).

### 5. Évora e o Alentejo (História e Gastronomia)
Para quem quer sentir a essência do interior de Portugal, o Alentejo é o lugar. **Évora**, uma cidade-museu, oferece monumentos romanos e medievais impressionantes. A região é também o coração gastronômico do país, com excelentes vinhos, azeites e pratos de carne e pão que são verdadeiras celebrações

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
Portugal é um país incrível com muitos lugares bonitos para visitar. Aqui estão cinco destinos que você definitivamente não deve perder:

1. Lisboa - A capital portuguesa é conhecida por sua arquitetura fascinante, incluindo casarios coloridos e belas igrejas. Não deixe de visitar o castelo de São Jorge e o Elevador de Santa Justa.

2. Porto - Esta cidade no norte de Portugal é famosa por sua produção de vinho do Porto. A cidade tem uma arquitetura impressionante ao longo do rio Douro e é conhecida por sua vibrante vida noturna.

3. Algarve - Esta região sul de Portugal é famosa por suas praias de areia dourada, cavernas rochosas e campos de golfe. É uma área popular para turismo de praia e de luxo.

4. Évora - Uma cidade antiga no Alentejo, Évora é um Patrimônio Mundial da UNESCO. Aqui você pode visitar o Templo de Diana e a Catedral de Évora.

5. Fátima - Conhecida internacionalmente como um local de peregrinação católica, Fátima é um lugar significativo na história religiosa de Portugal. 

Lembre-se de que Portugal tem muito mais para oferecer, e cada lugar tem sua própria história e beleza única.

prompt:
Translate the following English text to Spanish:

"We regret to inform you that the position has been filled by another candidate."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Depending on the level of formality you wish to convey, here are a few ways to translate that sentence:

**1. Formal (Most common for professional emails):**
> "Lamentamos informarle que el puesto ha sido ocupado por otro candidato."

**2. Slightly more direct/standard:**
> "Nos lamentamos de comunicarle que la posición ya ha sido cubierta por otro candidato."

**3. Softened/Polite (Common in HR):**
> "Sentimos informarle que hemos decidido avanzar con otro candidato para este puesto."
*(Literal translation: We are sorry to inform you that we have decided to move forward with another candidate for this position.)*

**Key Vocabulary:**
*   *Lamentamos informarle:* We regret to inform you (formal).
*   *El puesto / La posición:* The position.
*   *Ocupado / Cubierto:* Filled.
*   *Candidato:* Candidate.

prompt: Write a professional email declining a job offer politely.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Since there are different reasons for declining an offer, I have provided three templates: a **standard/general** version, one for when you’ve **accepted another offer**, and one for when the **salary/benefits** didn't meet your needs.

### Option 1: Standard & General (Best if you don't want to give a specific reason)
*Use this if you want to keep it brief and professional without over-explaining.*

**Subject:** Job Offer: [Job Title] – [Your Name]

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

Thank you very much for offering me the position of [Job Title] with [Company Name]. I truly appreciated the opportunity to meet the team and learn more about the organization.

After careful consideration, I have decided not to accept the offer at this time. This was a difficult decision, but I have decided to pursue a different path that aligns more closely with my current professional goals.

Thank you again for your time, your interest in my candidacy, and the professional manner in which the interview process was conducted. I wish you and [Company Name] all the best in finding the right candidate.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]
[Your LinkedIn Profile (Optional)]

---

### Option 2: If you accepted another offer
*Use this if you want to be transparent about why you are declining.*

**Subject:** Job Offer: [Job Title] – [Your Name]

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

Thank you so much for the offer to join [Company Name] as a [Job Title]. It was a pleasure learning about your team and the exciting work you are doing.

While I was very impressed with the company, I am writing to formally decline the offer. I have decided to accept another opportunity that aligns more closely with my current career objectives and long-term interests.

I want to express my sincere gratitude for the time you spent interviewing me. I hope our paths may cross again in the future, and I wish you and the team continued success.

Sincerely,

[Your Name]
[Your Phone Number]

---

### Option 3: If the compensation/terms were the issue
*Use this only if you want to leave the door open for a counter-offer (though usually, by the time you send a decline, it is best to move on).*

**Subject:** Job Offer: [Job Title] –

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

I hope this message finds you well.

First and foremost, I would like to express my sincere gratitude for considering me for the [Position Name] role at [Company Name]. It was an honor to go through the interview process, and I truly appreciate the time and effort you and your team invested in evaluating my qualifications.

After careful consideration and thorough reflection, I have decided to pursue other opportunities that better align with my career goals at this time. While I am deeply impressed by [Company Name]'s mission, values, and the work environment, I believe that the current path I am taking is the best fit for my career aspirations.

Please know that this decision was not made lightly, and I am genuinely disappointed that I will not be joining your team. I am grateful for the opportunity to have been considered and I will always cherish the insights and experiences gained during the interview process.

I would be more than happy to assist in the transition of my role, if needed, and I will ensure that all communication is seamless to help with the recruitment process for the new candidate. Additionally, I would like to thank you and the entire [Department Name] team for the support and guidance you have provided during my application.

I wish [Company Name] continued success in your endeavors and look forward to staying connected. If my path aligns with [Company Name]'s in the future, I would be more than willing to revisit the possibility of working together.

Thank you once again for your understanding, and for giving me the opportunity to be a part of this fantastic organization.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Contact Information]  
[Your LinkedIn Profile (optional)]

I want to emphasize that this decision was not an easy one. The prospect of joining [Company Name] and contributing to [specific project or team] was very appealing. However, I believe that my current professional trajectory aligns more closely with my long-term objectives.

I would like to take this opportunity to thank you once again for the offer. I am impressed by the dedication and professionalism that [Company Name] demonstrates, and I am confident that you will find a candidate who will excel in this role.

I would appreciate it if you could keep my application on file for future opportunities that may align more closely with my career aspirations. I remain interested in [Company Name] and would be more than happy to reapply for positions in the future.

Once again, thank you for the opportunity, and I wish you and your team continued success.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
[Your Contact Information]

prompt:

"Please find attached the signed contract for your review and records."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Depending on the level of formality you wish to use, here are a few ways to translate this:

**1. Formal (Standard for business correspondence):**
> "Anbei erhalten Sie den unterzeichneten Vertrag zu Ihrer Durchsicht und für Ihre Unterlagen."

**2. Slightly more modern/direct (Common in modern business emails):**
> "Im Anhang finden Sie den unterschriebenen Vertrag zu Ihrer Durchsicht und für Ihre Unterlagen."

**3. Very formal/Traditional:**
> "Anbei übersenden wir Ihnen den unterzeichneten Vertrag zu Ihrer gefälligen Durchsicht sowie zu Ihrer Ablage."

**Key Vocabulary:**
*   *Anbei / Im Anhang* = Attached / In the attachment
*   *Unterzeichnet / Unterschrieben* = Signed
*   *Der Vertrag* = The contract
*   *Durchsicht* = Review
*   *Unterlagen* = Records/Documents

prompt:
[Respond in Hebrew]

עזור לי לכתוב נאום לבר מצווה של הבן שלי.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
בשמחה רבה! בר מצווה היא רגע מרגש מאוד, והנאום הוא ההזדמנות שלכם להביע גאווה, אהבה ואיחולים לבן שלכם.

כדי שאוכל לעזור לך לכתוב משהו אישי ומדויק, כדאי שנבנה את הנאום לפי מבנה קלאסי, אבל אני אצטרך ממך כמה פרטים (אפשר לכתוב לי בנקודות).

### מבנה מומלץ לנאום הורה:

1.  **פתיחה:** ברכה לאורחים, תודה על הגעתם, והצהרה קצרה על הרגש שלכם ברגע זה.
2.  **מבט לאחור (הילדות):** סיפור קטן, זיכרון מצחיק או תיאור של איך הוא היה כתינוק/ילד קטן. זה מוסיף חמימות ונוסטלגיה.
3.  **הילד של היום (האופי):** כאן מגיע הלב של הנאום. מה אתם הכי אוהבים בו? (הטוב לב שלו, החוש הומור, ההתמדה בלימודים, התחביבים שלו, העזרה להורים/אחים).
4.  **המעבר לבגרות:** התייחסות למעמד הבר מצווה – לא רק כטקס, אלא כרגע של צמיחה ואחריות.
5.  **ברכה לעתיד:** איחולים אישיים (שתמיד תהיה שמח, שתמשיך לחקור, שתהיה אדם טוב וכו').
6.  **סיום:** משפט סיכום חזק וברכה קצרה (או הצעה להרים כוסית).

---

### כדי שאוכל לכתוב לך טיוטה, בבקשה ענה לי על השאלות הבאות (מה שמתאים לך):

1.  **מה הטון המבוקש?** (מרגש ודומע? מצחיק וקליל? רציני ומעמיק?)
2.  **איך קוראים לו?**
3.  **תכונות אופי בולטות:**

prompt:
[Respond in German]

Erkläre mir einfach, wie künstliche Intelligenz funktioniert.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Gerne! Stell dir Künstliche Intelligenz (KI) nicht wie einen Roboter mit einem Gehirn vor, sondern eher wie einen **extrem schnellen und lernfähigen Schüler**, der Muster in riesigen Datenmengen erkennt.

Hier ist eine einfache Erklärung in drei Schritten:

### 1. Das Fundament: Daten und Muster
Eine KI „weiß“ von Natur aus nichts. Damit sie etwas lernen kann, füttert man sie mit riesigen Mengen an Informationen (Daten).
*   **Beispiel Bilderkennung:** Wenn du einer KI zeigen willst, was eine Katze ist, zeigst du ihr nicht die Definition „Säugetier mit Schnurrhaaren“, sondern du zeigst ihr Millionen von Katzenbildern.
*   Die KI analysiert diese Bilder und sucht nach Mustern: „Spitze Ohren“, „bestimmte Form der Nase“, „Schnurrhaare“. Sie lernt nicht die *Regel*, sondern das *Muster*.

### 2. Das Gehirn: Neuronale Netze
Um diese Muster zu finden, nutzt man sogenannte **„Neuronale Netze“**. Das ist ein Computerprogramm, das grob der Funktionsweise unseres Gehirns nachempfunden ist.
*   Stell dir viele Schichten von Filtern vor. Das erste Filter-Lager erkennt vielleicht nur Linien. Das nächste erkennt Kreise. Das nächste erkennt Augen.
*   Am Ende fließen alle Informationen zusammen und die KI sagt: „Mit einer Wahrscheinlichkeit von 98 % ist das eine Katze.“

### 3. Das Lernen: Aus Fehlern lernen (Training)
Der wichtigste Teil ist der Lernprozess. Am Anfang rät die KI nur.
*   Wenn sie ein Bild einer Katze sieht und „Hund“ sagt, bekommt das System ein negatives Signal (eine mathematische Korrektur).
*   Die KI passt ihre inneren Filter an, damit sie beim nächsten Mal näher an der richtigen Antwort liegt. Dieser Prozess wird Milliarden Mal wiederholt, bis die Fehler minimal werden.

---

### Zusammenfassend: Der Unterschied zu normaler Software

*   **Normale Software** folgt strikten Befehlen: *„WENN der Nutzer auf diesen Knopf drückt, DANN öffne das Fenster.“* (Wenn-Dann-Logik).
*   **KI** arbeitet mit Wahrscheinlichkeiten: *„Basierend auf allem

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
Künstliche Intelligenz (KI) funktioniert in groben Zügen, indem sie eine Menge an Informationen oder Daten analysiert, um Muster und Zusammenhänge zu erkennen. Diese Erkenntnisse werden dann verwendet, um Entscheidungen zu treffen oder Vorhersagen zu treffen.

Es gibt verschiedene Arten von KI, aber die am häufigsten verwendete Methode ist maschinelles Lernen. In diesem Prozess wird der Computer mit einem großen Datensatz ausgestattet, der ihn mit Informationen füttert, die ihm helfen, Muster zu erkennen. Anschließend wird der Computer mit einem Algorithmus ausgestattet, der ihm ermöglicht, sich selbst zu verbessern, indem er die Muster anwendet, die er gelernt hat.

Der Computer lernt also durch Übung und Erfahrung, anstatt explizit programmiert zu werden, wie er bestimmte Aufgaben ausführen soll. Dies ermöglicht es der KI, komplexe Aufgaben effektiv und effizient zu erledigen.

Es ist wichtig zu beachten, dass KI nicht denkt oder fühlt wie ein Mensch, sondern stattdessen auf der Basis von Mustererkennung und Statistik arbeitet.

Der Computer lernt also durch Übung und Erfahrung, anstatt explizit programmiert zu werden, wie er bestimmte Aufgaben ausführen soll. Dies ermöglicht es der KI, komplexe Aufgaben effektiv und effizient zu erledigen.

Es ist wichtig zu beachten, dass KI nicht denkt oder fühlt wie ein Mensch, sondern stattdessen auf der Basis von Mustererkennung und Statistik arbeitet.

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw: Künstliche Intelligenz (kurz KI) funktioniert grundsätzlich darin, dass sie Algorithmen verwendet, die auf großen Datenmengen lernen können und damit automatisiert Aufgaben übernehmen können, die sonst von Menschen durchgeführt werden müssen. Dabei gibt es verschiedene Arten von künstlicher Intelligenz, wie z.B. Maschinelles Lernen, Tiefes Lernen, Neuronale Netze oder Evolutionäre Algorithmen. Diese Algorithmen können durch Training auf großen Datenmengen und durch Verbesserung ihrer Parameter ihre Leistung steigern und Aufgaben lösen, die komplexer sind als einfache Programme. Sie können z.B. in der Spracherkennung, in der Bilderkennung oder in der Robotik verwendet werden, um Aufgaben wie Spracherkennung, Bilderkennung oder Bewegungskontrolle automatisiert ausführen zu können.

prompt: Explica la importancia de las energías renovables. Responde en inglés.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
The importance of renewable energy can be summarized through several key pillars: environmental protection, economic stability, and energy security. Here is a detailed explanation:

### 1. Mitigation of Climate Change
The most critical reason for transitioning to renewable energy is to reduce greenhouse gas emissions. Traditional fossil fuels (coal, oil, and natural gas) release massive amounts of carbon dioxide ($CO_2$) and other gases into the atmosphere, which trap heat and drive global warming. Renewable sources—such as solar, wind, hydroelectric, and geothermal—produce little to no emissions during operation, making them essential to meeting international climate goals (like the Paris Agreement).

### 2. Public Health Improvements
The burning of fossil fuels releases pollutants such as sulfur dioxide, nitrogen oxides, and particulate matter. These contribute to smog, acid rain, and respiratory and cardiovascular diseases in humans. By switching to clean energy, we significantly reduce air and water pollution, leading to better public health outcomes and lower healthcare costs.

### 3. Energy Security and Independence
Fossil fuels are often concentrated in specific geographic regions, which can lead to geopolitical tensions and economic instability when prices fluctuate or supply chains are disrupted. Renewable energy, however, can be harvested locally almost anywhere on Earth. This allows countries to reduce their dependence on foreign fuel imports and build a more resilient, self-sufficient energy infrastructure.

### 4. Economic Growth and Job Creation
The renewable energy sector is a massive driver of modern economic development. It is more labor-intensive than the fossil fuel industry, meaning it creates more jobs per unit of energy produced. These jobs span various sectors, including manufacturing, installation, engineering, and maintenance. Furthermore, as technology advances, the cost of renewable energy continues to drop, making it increasingly competitive with—and often cheaper than—fossil fuels.

### 5. Sustainability and Resource Availability
Fossil fuels are finite; once they are extracted and burned, they are gone forever. In contrast, renewable energy comes from natural processes that are constantly replenished. The sun will continue to shine and the wind will continue to blow, ensuring that we can meet the energy needs of current and future generations without exhausting the planet's resources.

### Conclusion
In short, renewable energy is not just an "alternative" to fossil fuels; it is a fundamental necessity for a **sustainable, healthy, and stable global future.**

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
Renewable energy plays a crucial role in our society for several reasons:

1. **Sustainability**: Unlike fossil fuels, which are finite and will eventually run out, renewable energy sources like solar, wind, hydro, and geothermal power are sustainable. They can be replenished naturally and continuously.

2. **Environmental Protection**: Renewable energy sources produce little to no greenhouse gases or pollutants, which helps to mitigate climate change and improve air quality. They help to reduce the carbon footprint and combat global warming.

3. **Energy Security**: By reducing dependence on imported fuels, countries can enhance their energy security and reduce geopolitical tensions associated with energy supply. Renewable energy can be produced locally, reducing reliance on foreign energy sources.

4. **Economic Benefits**: Renewable energy creates jobs, stimulates local economies, and can help reduce energy costs over time. As technologies improve, the cost of renewable energy continues to decrease, making it more accessible and affordable.

5. **Health Benefits**: By reducing air pollution, renewable energy can lead to fewer health problems associated with fossil fuel combustion, such as asthma and heart disease.

6. **Technology Innovation**: The push towards renewable energy has spurred technological innovation, leading to more efficient and cost-effective solutions. This innovation can lead to advancements in other industries as well.

In summary, the shift towards renewable energy is essential for protecting the environment, ensuring energy security, and fostering sustainable economic growth.

3. **Energy Security**: By reducing dependence on imported fuels, countries can enhance their energy security and reduce geopolitical tensions associated with energy supply. Renewable energy can be produced locally, reducing reliance on foreign energy sources.

4. **Economic Benefits**: Renewable energy creates jobs, stimulates local economies, and can help reduce energy costs over time. As technologies improve, the cost of renewable energy continues to decrease, making it more accessible and affordable.

5. **Health Benefits**: By reducing air pollution, renewable energy can lead to fewer health problems associated with fossil fuel combustion, such as asthma and heart disease.

6. **Technology Innovation**: The push towards renewable energy has spurred technological innovation, leading to more efficient and cost-effective solutions. This innovation can lead to advancements in other industries as well.

In summary, the shift towards renewable energy is essential for protecting the environment, ensuring energy security, and fostering sustainable economic growth.

prompt:
Translate the following English text to Hungarian:

"She whispered softly, knowing that some secrets are better left untold."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Here are a few ways to translate this, depending on the desired tone:

**1. Most natural/literary (Recommended):**
> "Alánszólt halkan, tudva, hogy egyes titkok jobb, ha titokban maradnak."

**2. More poetic/formal:**
> "Suttogva mondta, tudva, hogy egyes titkokat jobb eltitkolni."

**3. Direct/Simple:**
> "Alánszólt halkan, mert tudta, hogy néhány titkot jobb nem elmondani."

**Key nuances:**
* **"Alánszólt"** or **"Suttogott"** both mean "whispered."
* **"Jobb, ha titokban maradnak"** is a common Hungarian idiom meaning "better left untold" (literally: "better if they remain in secret").

**3. Direct/Simple:**
> "Alánszólt halkan, mert tudta, hogy néhány titkot jobb nem elmondani."

**Key nuances:**
* **"Alánszólt"** or **"Suttogott"** both mean "whispered."
* **"Jobb, ha titokban maradnak"** is a common Hungarian idiom meaning "better left untold" (literally: "better if they remain in secret").

prompt: Beschreibe die Europäische Union in einfachen Worten. Antworte auf Französisch.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
L'Union européenne (UE) est un groupe de **27 pays** d'Europe qui ont décidé de travailler ensemble.

Voici les points principaux pour comprendre :

1.  **La paix :** L'objectif principal est d'empêcher les guerres entre les pays européens. En travaillant ensemble, ils deviennent des partenaires plutôt que des ennemis.
2.  **L'unité :** Les pays membres partagent des règles communes. Cela permet de faciliter le commerce (vendre et acheter des produits plus facilement) et de faire circuler les personnes sans avoir besoin de visas compliqués.
3.  **L'argent :** Beaucoup de pays utilisent la même monnaie : **l'euro**. Cela rend les voyages et les achats plus simples.
4.  **La solidarité :** Les pays s'entraident pour des projets importants, comme protéger l'environnement, améliorer l'éducation ou aider les pays qui ont des difficultés économiques.

En résumé, l'Union européenne est comme une **grande équipe** où les pays collaborent pour vivre mieux, être plus forts et plus en sécurité.
gemma-4-26B-A4B.answer:
L'Union européenne (UE) est un groupe de **27 pays** d'Europe qui ont décidé de travailler ensemble.

Voici les points principaux pour comprendre :

1.  **La paix :** L'objectif principal est d'empêcher les guerres entre les pays européens. En travaillant ensemble, ils deviennent des partenaires plutôt que des ennemis.
2.  **L'unité :** Les pays membres partagent des règles communes. Cela permet de faciliter le commerce (vendre et acheter des produits plus facilement) et de faire circuler les personnes sans avoir besoin de visas compliqués.
3.  **L'argent :** Beaucoup de pays utilisent la même monnaie : **l'euro**. Cela rend les voyages et les achats plus simples.
4.  **La solidarité :** Les pays s'entraident pour des projets importants, comme protéger l'environnement, améliorer l'éducation ou aider les pays qui ont des difficultés économiques.

En résumé, l'Union européenne est comme une **grande équipe** où les pays collaborent pour vivre mieux, être plus forts et plus en sécurité.

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw: La Union Européenne est une organisation qui regroupe plusieurs pays en Europe. Ces pays travaillent ensemble pour être plus forts et mieux gérer certaines choses comme l'argent, le travail et la sécurité. Ils ont aussi créé une zone où les gens peuvent facilement voyager d'un pays à l'autre et où les marchandises se déplacent librement. Les pays membres prennent souvent des décisions ensemble pour résoudre les problèmes et créer de meilleures opportunités pour les citoyens.
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer: La Union Européenne est une organisation qui regroupe plusieurs pays en Europe. Ces pays travaillent ensemble pour être plus forts et mieux gérer certaines choses comme l'argent, le travail et la sécurité. Ils ont aussi créé une zone où les gens peuvent facilement voyager d'un pays à l'autre et où les marchandises se déplacent librement. Les pays membres prennent souvent des décisions ensemble pour résoudre les problèmes et créer de meilleures opportunités pour les citoyens.

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw: La Union Européenne, couramment appelée l'UE, est une organisation internationale regroupant 27 pays d'Europe. Elle a été créée en 1993 pour promouvoir la coopération entre ses membres, développer l'économie et la sécurité, et favoriser la paix et la démocratie en Europe. Les pays membres de l'UE ont des systèmes politiques différents, mais ils ont tous adopté une constitution commune qui définit leur droit commun et leurs valeurs. Les pays de l'UE utilisent également une devise unique, l'euro, et ont des frontières ouvertes entre eux, ce qui facilite le commerce et la coopération entre les pays.
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.answer: La Union Européenne, couramment appelée l'UE, est une organisation internationale regroupant 27 pays d'Europe. Elle a été créée en 1993 pour promouvoir la coopération entre ses membres, développer l'économie et la sécurité, et favoriser la paix et la démocratie en Europe. Les pays membres de l'UE ont des systèmes politiques différents, mais ils ont tous adopté une constitution commune qui définit leur droit commun et leurs valeurs. Les pays de l'UE utilisent également une devise unique, l'euro, et ont des frontières ouvertes entre eux, ce qui facilite le commerce et la coopération entre les pays.

Translation (Romanian): 'Pasărea matinală prinde viermele.'

Is this translation natural? What would a native speaker say instead?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
### Rating: 5/10

### Explanation of Errors:

**1. Grammatical Error (Article Usage):**
The most significant error is the omission of the definite article. In Romanian, when referring to a specific object or a general concept in this context, you need the article. 
*   **Incorrect:** *...prinde viermele.* (This sounds like "catches worms" in a very broken, non-native way).
*   **Correct:** *...prinde **viergele**.* (catches **the** worm).

**2. Lack of Idiomatic Equivalence:**
While the translation is a "literal" translation (word-for-word), it is not an "idiomatic" translation. A translation is considered high quality when it conveys the *meaning* and *spirit* of the original using the target language's natural metaphors. The Romanian translation provided is a "calque"—it sounds like a sentence translated by a machine or someone learning the language, rather than a proverb used by a native speaker.

---

### Is this translation natural?
**No.** A native speaker would understand what you mean, but they would immediately recognize that you are translating an English idiom literally. It sounds "foreign."

### What would a native speaker say instead?

In Romanian, there isn't a direct "bird/worm" metaphor that is used as frequently, but there are two ways to handle this:

**1. The Functional Equivalent (The actual proverb):**
If you want to convey the same meaning (that those who act early succeed), a Romanian would use:
> **"Cine se scoală de dimineață, departe ajunge."**
> *(Literal translation: "He who rises early, reaches far.")*

This is the most natural way to express the sentiment of "The early bird catches the worm."

**2. The Literal (but grammatically correct) version:**
If you are specifically talking about a bird and a worm (for example, in a children's book) and you want to keep the imagery, you must fix the grammar:
> **"Pasărea matinală prinde viergele."**

**Summary Recommendation:**
If your goal is to translate the **proverb**, use: *"Cine se scoală de dimineață, departe ajunge."*
If your goal is to translate the **sentence**, use: *"Pasărea matinală

The translation "Pasărea matinală prinde viermele" is not quite natural and idiomatic in Romanian. Here's why:

1. **Literal Translation**: The phrase is a literal translation of the English idiom, which doesn't capture the idiomatic meaning. In Romanian, there's a similar proverb that conveys the same meaning more naturally.

2. **Proverb Usage**: The Romanian equivalent of "The early bird catches the worm" is "Pasărea de răsărit prinde vorbă." This proverb means that the early riser or the early bird has the advantage.

**Rating**: 2/10

### Explanation:
- **Pasărea matinală**: While "pasărea matinală" (the early bird) is correct, it's more natural to say "pasărea de răsărit" (the dawn bird).
- **Prinde viermele**: This part is not idiomatic. The Romanian equivalent would use "prinde vorbă" (gets the word), which means "gets the advantage" or "gets the benefit."

### Natural Equivalent:
A native Romanian speaker would say:
- "Pasărea de răsărit prinde vorbă."
- Or simply: "Pasărea de răsărit cântă cu plăcere" (The dawn bird sings happily), which conveys the idea that the early riser has a better start to the day.

This translation is more natural and captures the idiomatic meaning of the English proverb.

prompt:
[Respond in Hungarian]

Magyarázd el a fotoszintézis folyamatát egyszerűen.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
A fotoszintézis a növények életének legfontosabb folyamata, amivel saját élelmet készítenek el. Egyszerűen fogalmazva ez egy olyan folyamat, ahol a növény **fényenergia segítségével összekeveri a vizet és a levegőt, hogy cukrot (energiát) és oxigént termeljen.**

Íme a folyamat lépésről lépésre, legegyszerűbben megértve:

### 1. Mi kell hozzá? (A hozzávalók)
Ahhoz, hogy a növény elvégezze a munkát, három dologra van szüksége:
*   **Napfény:** Ez a folyamat "üzemanyaga", az energiaforrás.
*   **Víz:** A növény a gyökereivel szívja fel a földből.
*   **Szén-dioxid (CO2):** Ezt a levegőből veszi fel a levele através apró, mikroszkopikus nyílásokon keresztül.

### 2. Hol történik? (A konyha)
A folyamat a leveleken belül zajlik, pontosan a levelek sejtjeiben található **kloroplasztuszokban** (kátyúkban). Ezek tartalmazzák a **klorofillt**, ami a növénynek a zöld színét adja. A klorofill a feladata, hogy "elkapja" a napfény energiáját.

### 3. Hogyan történik? (A folyamat)
Képzeld el, mintha a növény egy konyha:
1.  A napfény energiája "beindítja a sütőt".
2.  A növény a vizet és a szén-dioxidot összekeveri a napfény energiájával.
3.  Ez egy kémiai reakció, amely során az anyagok átalakulnak.

### 4. Mi lesz az eredmény? (A késztermék)
A folyamat végén két fontos dolog keletkezik:
*   **Glükóz (cukor):** Ez a növény "éttermét" jelenti. Ezt használja fel a növekedéshez, a fejlődéshez és az életben maradáshoz.
*

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
A fotoszintézis egy olyan folyamat, amely során a növények, a szívkák és más fotosszintézis képzetesek összealkoztatják a víz és a dióxidanyag oxigén és cukrot a napfény segítségével. Ez a folyamat lényegében három lépést tartalmaz:

1. A napfényt használó fotoszférmák (esztreidiszulfárok) képesek átváltani a fényenergiát elektromos energiává.
2. Ez az energiával a víz felbomlódik, és az oxigén és hidrogén részvényei különválódnak.
3. Ezen hidrogénnel és a dióxidanyag segítségével a növények önmaguk cukrot hoznak létre.

A fotoszintézis a növényeknek és az egész életköröknek fontos, mivel ez a folyamat hozza létre a világ cukros záporát, és kialakítja az oxigén tartalmát az éghajlatban.

prompt:
[Respond in Indonesian]

Apa hak-hak dasar pekerja di Indonesia?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Di Indonesia, hak-hak dasar pekerja diatur secara utama dalam **Undang-Undang No. 13 Tahun 2003 tentang Ketenagakerjaan**, yang kemudian beberapa ketentuannya telah diubah melalui **UU No. 6 Tahun 2023 (Penetapan Perppu Cipta Kerja menjadi Undang-Undang)**.

Berikut adalah poin-poin utama hak-hak dasar pekerja di Indonesia:

### 1. Hak Atas Upah yang Layak
Pekerja berhak menerima imbalan berupa upah yang tidak boleh lebih rendah dari **Upah Minimum** (UMK/UMP) yang telah ditetapkan oleh pemerintah daerah setempat. Upah harus dibayarkan tepat waktu dan sesuai dengan kesepakatan dalam kontrak kerja.

### 2. Hak Atas Waktu Kerja dan Istirahat
*   **Waktu Kerja:** Umumnya adalah 7 jam sehari (untuk 6 hari kerja seminggu) atau 8 jam sehari (untuk 5 hari kerja seminggu).
*   **Lembur:** Jika bekerja melebihi waktu tersebut, pekerja berhak mendapatkan **upah lembur**.
*   **Istirahat:** Pekerja berhak atas istirahat antar jam kerja, istirahat mingguan (1 atau 2 hari), dan cuti tahunan (minimal 12 hari kerja setelah bekerja selama 12 bulan secara terus-menerus).

### 3. Hak Atas Perlindungan Keselamatan dan Kesehatan Kerja (K3)
Perusahaan wajib menyediakan lingkungan kerja yang aman, alat pelindung diri (APD) yang memadai, dan prosedur kerja yang meminimalisir risiko kecelakaan kerja atau penyakit akibat kerja.

### 4. Hak Atas Jaminan Sosial (BPJS)
Setiap pekerja berhak mendapatkan perlindungan sosial melalui program BPJS, yang meliputi:
*   **BPJS Ketenagakerjaan:** Jaminan Kecelakaan Kerja (JKK), Jaminan Kematian (JKM), Jaminan Hari Tua (JHT), Jaminan Pensiun (JP), dan Jaminan Kehilangan Pekerjaan (JKP).
*   **BPJS Kesehatan:** Jaminan pemeliharaan kesehatan.

### 5. Hak Atas Cuti Khusus
Selain cuti tahunan, pekerja berhak atas cuti karena alasan tertentu, seperti:
*   Cuti melahirkan dan keguguran (bagi perempuan).

Hak-hak dasar pekerja di Indonesia meliputi beberapa poin penting, antara lain:

2. Perlindungan sosial: Termasuk jaminan kesehatan, jaminan hari tua, jaminan kecelakaan kerja, dan jaminan kematian.

3. Kesejahteraan kerja: Termasuk perlindungan dari pelecehan dan diskriminasi, serta lingkungan kerja yang aman dan sehat.

4. Hari libur: Pekerja berhak atas libur minggu, libur nasional, dan cuti tahunan.

5. Istirahat dan waktu makan: Pekerja berhak mendapatkan waktu istirahat dan waktu makan yang cukup selama jam kerja.

6. Hak untuk mengorganisir: Pekerja berhak untuk mengorganisir diri dalam serikat pekerja dan berpartisipasi dalam negosiasi bersama.

7. Hak untuk mengajukan keluhan: Pekerja berhak untuk mengajukan keluhan atau permasalahan yang dialaminya kepada atasan atau pihak yang berwenang.

8. Kesempatan untuk belajar dan berkembang: Pekerja berhak untuk mendapatkan pelatihan dan pendidikan untuk meningkatkan kompetensi kerjanya.

Hak-hak ini diatur dalam Undang-Undang No. 13 Tahun 2003 tentang Ketenagakerjaan dan aturan turunannya.

prompt:
[Respond in Indonesian]

Apa perbedaan antara tabungan dan investasi?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Tentu, berikut adalah penjelasan mengenai perbedaan antara tabungan dan investasi dalam bahasa Indonesia:

Secara sederhana, **tabungan** adalah tempat untuk menyimpan uang agar aman dan mudah diambil, sedangkan **investasi** adalah cara untuk menumbuhkan uang agar nilainya bertambah di masa depan.

Berikut adalah rincian perbedaannya berdasarkan beberapa aspek utama:

### 1. Tujuan Utama
*   **Tabungan:** Fokus utamanya adalah **keamanan** dan **likuiditas** (kemudahan mencairkan uang). Tabungan biasanya digunakan untuk dana darurat, persiapan pengeluaran jangka pendek (seperti membeli gadget atau liburan), atau menyimpan uang yang akan segera digunakan.
*   **Investasi:** Fokus utamanya adalah **pertumbuhan kekayaan** dan **melawan inflasi**. Investasi dilakukan untuk tujuan jangka menengah atau jangka panjang, seperti dana pendidikan anak, membeli rumah, atau dana pensiun.

### 2. Risiko
*   **Tabungan:** Memiliki **risiko yang sangat rendah**. Uang Anda di bank cenderung aman karena dijamin oleh lembaga penjamin simpanan (seperti LPS di Indonesia). Risiko utamanya hanyalah penurunan nilai daya beli akibat inflasi.
*   **Investasi:** Memiliki **risiko yang bervariasi** (dari rendah hingga sangat tinggi). Nilai investasi Anda bisa naik, tetapi juga bisa turun (bahkan hilang) tergantung pada instrumen yang dipilih (seperti saham, kripto, atau reksadana).

### 3. Imbal Hasil (Keuntungan)
*   **Tabungan:** Memberikan imbal hasil yang **rendah**, biasanya dalam bentuk bunga bank yang kecil. Seringkali, bunga tabungan tidak cukup tinggi untuk mengimbangi kenaikan harga barang (inflasi).
*   **Investasi:** Menawarkan potensi **imbal hasil yang lebih tinggi** daripada tabungan. Anda bisa mendapatkan keuntungan melalui kenaikan harga aset (*capital gain*) atau pembagian keuntungan (*dividen/kupon*).

### 4. Likuiditas (Kemudahan Mencairkan Uang)
*   **Tabungan:** Sangat **likuid**. Anda bisa mengambil uang melalui ATM atau transfer kapan saja saat dibutuhkan.
*   **Investasi:** Tingkat likuiditasnya **bervariasi**. Ada yang mudah dicairkan (seperti reksadana), namun ada juga yang membutuhkan waktu lama atau memiliki jangka waktu tertentu (seperti deposito atau properti).

prompt:
Translate the following English text to Portuguese:

"The early bird catches the worm, but the second mouse gets the cheese."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
A tradução mais direta e natural para o português é:

**"O pássaro que chega cedo pega a minhoca, mas o segundo rato pega o queijo."**

### Explicação:
*   **"The early bird catches the worm"**: É um provérbio comum que equivale ao ditado em português: *"Deus ajuda quem cedo madruga"*. No entanto, em traduções literárias, costuma-se manter a imagem do pássaro e da minhoca.
*   **"The second mouse gets the cheese"**: Esta é uma frase irônica que sugere que, às vezes, ser o primeiro a tentar algo pode ser perigoso (o primeiro rato cai na armadilha), e é melhor esperar para colher os benefícios. Não existe um ditado equivalente exato em português, por isso a tradução literal é a melhor opção.
gemma-4-26B-A4B.answer:

Não existe um ditado equivalente exato em português, por isso a tradução literal é a melhor opção.

prompt: מה זה שינוי אקלימי? ענה באנגלית.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
**Climate change** refers to long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns. While these shifts can be natural (due to variations in the solar cycle), since the 1800s, human activities have been the primary driver of climate change.

Here are the key components of climate change:

1.  **The Greenhouse Effect:** This is the main cause. Human activities—such as burning fossil fuels (coal, oil, and gas), deforestation, and agriculture—release "greenhouse gases" like carbon dioxide ($CO_2$) and methane ($CH_4$) into the atmosphere. These gases trap heat from the sun, preventing it from escaping back into space, which warms the planet.
2.  **Global Warming:** This is the increase in the Earth's average surface temperature. While "global warming" refers specifically to the rise in temperature, "climate change" is a broader term that includes warming and all the resulting side effects.
3.  **Consequences and Impacts:** Climate change leads to many environmental changes, including:
    *   **Melting Ice:** Glaciers and polar ice caps are melting, which contributes to rising sea levels.
    *   **Extreme Weather:** An increase in the frequency and intensity of heatwaves, droughts, floods, and severe storms.
    *   **Ocean Acidification:** As oceans absorb more $CO_2$, they become more acidic, which harms marine life like coral reefs.
    *   **Loss of Biodiversity:** Many species struggle to adapt to rapidly changing environments, leading to extinction risks.

In summary, climate change is a global phenomenon driven largely by human-induced greenhouse gas emissions, resulting in fundamental changes to the Earth's climate systems.

1.  **The Greenhouse Effect:** This is the main cause. Human activities—such as burning fossil fuels (coal, oil, and gas), deforestation, and agriculture—release "greenhouse gases" like carbon dioxide ($CO_2$) and methane ($CH_4$) into the atmosphere. These gases trap heat from the sun, preventing it from escaping back into space, which warms the planet.
2.  **Global Warming:** This is the increase in the Earth's average surface temperature. While "global warming" refers specifically to the rise in temperature, "climate change" is a broader term that includes warming and all the resulting side effects.
3.  **Consequences and Impacts:** Climate change leads to many environmental changes, including:
    *   **Melting Ice:** Glaciers and polar ice caps are melting, which contributes to rising sea levels.
    *   **Extreme Weather:** An increase in the frequency and intensity of heatwaves, droughts, floods, and severe storms.
    *   **Ocean Acidification:** As oceans absorb more $CO_2$, they become more acidic, which harms marine life like coral reefs.
    *   **Loss of Biodiversity:** Many species struggle to adapt to rapidly changing environments, leading to extinction risks.

In summary, climate change is a global phenomenon driven largely by human-induced greenhouse gas emissions, resulting in fundamental changes to the Earth's climate systems.

prompt:
[Respond in French]

Recommande-moi 5 livres classiques de la littérature française.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Voici une sélection de 5 chefs-d'œuvre incontournables de la littérature française, couvrant différentes époques et styles :

1. ***Les Misérables* – Victor Hugo**
   C'est l'un des romans les plus célèbres au monde. À travers le destin de Jean Valjean, Hugo livre une fresque sociale et historique monumentale qui explore les thèmes de la rédemption, de la justice, de l'amour et de la lutte des classes dans la France du XIXe siècle.

2. ***Madame Bovary* – Gustave Flaubert**
   Ce roman est le pilier du réalisme. Il raconte l'histoire d'Emma Bovary, une femme qui cherche à échapper à l'ennui de sa vie provinciale à travers des liaisons passionnées et des rêves de grandeur. Le style de Flaubert, d'une précision chirurgicale, a révolutionné l'écriture romanesque.

3. ***Le Père Goriot* – Honoré de Balzac**
   Issu de la fresque monumentale *La Comédie humaine*, ce livre est une plongée fascinante dans la société parisienne. Il explore l'ambition sociale, la cruauté paternelle et la quête de fortune, mettant en scène des personnages mémorables comme le dévoué Rastignac.

4. ***L'Étranger* – Albert Camus**
   Si vous préférez une lecture plus courte et moderne, ce classique de l'existentialisme est essentiel. À travers le personnage de Meursault, un homme qui semble étranger au monde et à ses propres émotions, Camus explore l'absurdité de la condition humaine.

5. ***Le Rouge et le Noir* – Stendhal**
   Un chef-d'œuvre de la psychologie romanesque. On y suit l'ascension sociale de Julien Sorel, un jeune homme ambitieux et complexe qui tente de naviguer dans la société de la Restauration en utilisant son intelligence et ses conquêtes amoureuses.

**Conseil :** Si vous débutez en littérature classique, *L'Étranger* est souvent le plus accessible. Si vous voulez une immersion totale, *Les Misérables* est une expérience inoubliable.

1. "Les Misérables" de Victor Hugo : Un roman historique et social qui relate l'histoire de Jean Valjean, un ancien condamné qui cherche à se racheter.

3. "Madame Bovary" de Gustave Flaubert : Un roman qui relate les aventures de l'antihéroïne Emma Bovary, une femme insatisfaite dans son mariage qui cherche la passion et l'excitation.

4. "Le Comte de Monte-Cristo" d'Alexandre Dumas : Un roman d'aventure qui suit le parcours de Edmond Dantès, un jeune homme qui est injustement enfermé en prison et qui se libère pour devenir le Comte de Monte-Cristo.

5. "La Peste" d'Albert Camus : Un roman philosophique qui utilise l'épidémie de peste pour examiner la condition humaine et les questions morales et existentielles.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:

**1. Formal (Most common for official emails or business letters):**
> "Temos o prazer de informar que a sua candidatura foi aprovada."

**2. Slightly more direct/standard:**
> "Informamos que a sua inscrição foi aprovada."

**3. If "application" refers to a request (like a loan or a permit):**
> "Temos o prazer de informar que o seu pedido foi aprovado."

**Key Vocabulary:**
*   *Candidatura:* Application (for a job or a position).
*   *Inscrição:* Application/Registration (for a course or an event).
*   *Pedido:* Application/Request (for a service or document).
*   *Aprovada/Aprovado:* Approved.

הסבר לי מהי בינה מלאכותית בצורה פשוטה.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
בשמחה! הנה הסבר פשוט למהי בינה מלאכותית (AI):

תחשוב על **בינה מלאכותית** כעל תוכנה למחשב, אבל כזו שלא רק מבצעת פקודות קבועות מראש, אלא "לומדת" איך לבצע משימות בצורה דומה לאופן שבו בני אדם חושבים.

כדי להבין את זה טוב יותר, בוא נשווה בין מחשב רגיל לבינה מלאכותית:

1.  **מחשב רגיל (כמו מתכון):** אם תיתן למחשב רגיל מתכון לעוגה, הוא יבצע בדיוק את השלבים שכתבת. אם שכחת לכתוב "להוסיף סוכר", הוא פשוט לא יוסיף סוכר. הוא לא יכול "להחליט" או "להבין" שמשהו חסר. הוא רק עוקב אחרי הוראות מדויקות.
2.  **בינה מלאכותית (כמו תלמיד):** במקום לתת לה הוראות מדויקות לכל צעד, אנחנו נותנים לה **המון דוגמאות**. לדוגמה, אם רוצים שהיא תזהה תמונה של חתול, לא נסביר לה "יש לו אוזניים משtriangles וזנב", אלא פשוט נראה לה מיליוני תמונות של חתולים. המחשב ינתח את התמונות ויגלה בעצמו את המאפיינים שמשותפים לכל החתולים. בסוף, כשתראה לו תמונה חדשה, הוא יוכל להגיד: "זה נראה לי כמו חתול!".

### איך זה עובד בפועל? (בלי להסתבך בטכניקה)
הבינה המלאכותית מבוססת על **נתונים** (Data) ועל **דפוסי זיהוי** (Patterns). היא מחפשת קשרים בין דברים.
*   אם היא קוראת מיליוני טקסטים, היא לומדת אילו מילים בדרך כלל מופיעות אחת ליד השנייה (כך עובד ChatGPT).
*   אם היא מקשיבה למיליוני שירים

prompt: Décris la cuisine française. Réponds en roumain.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Bucătăria franceză este considerată una dintre cele mai sofisticate și influente din lume, fiind un pilon central al culturii gastronomice globale. Ea nu este doar despre mâncare, ci despre un întreg ritual de plăcere, estetică și respect pentru ingrediente.

Iată principalele caracteristici care definesc bucătăria franceză:

**1. Tehnica și rigoarea:**
Bucătăria franceză se bazează pe tehnici clasice foarte precise (cum ar fi *sauter*, *pocher*, *braiser* sau *confit*). Aceste tehnici au fost codificate de bucătari celebri precum Auguste Escoffier și servesc drept bază pentru educația culinară în întreaga lume.

**2. Importanța sosurilor:**
Sosul este „sufletul” unui preparat francez. Existile clasice (cum ar fi *Béchamel*, *Velouté*, *Hollandaise* sau *Espagnole*) sunt fundamentale și transformă ingrediente simple în experiențe complexe și bogate în aromă.

**3. Produsele de bază și ingredientele de calitate:**
Francezii pun un preț imens pe proveniența ingredientelor. Calitatea produselor este esențială:
*   **Brânzeturile:** Există sute de soiuri (Brie, Camembert, Roquefort, Comté), fiecare având o regiune și o textură specifică.
*   **Vinurile:** Vinul nu este doar o băutură, ci un partener esențial care completează gustul mâncării.
*   **Produsele de panificație:** Baghetele proaspete, croissanturile și diversele tipuri de patiserie (macarons, eclere, tarte) sunt simboluri naționale.
*   **Untul și smântâna:** Acestea oferă consistența și bogăția caracteristică preparatelor franțuzești.

**4. Diversitatea regională:**
Bucătăria franceză nu este uniformă; ea variază enorm de la o regiune la alta:
*   În **Provence** (sud), predomină uleiul de măsline, usturoiul, ierburile provensale și legumele (bucătărie

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw: Culinaria franceză este cunoscută în întreaga lume pentru bogăția sa și varietatea sa. Este o combinare de ingrediente de calitate, tehnici de pregătire sofisticate și o atenție specială acordată portiunii și prezentării mesei. Unele dintre cele mai cunoscute ingrediente ale culinarii franceze sunt usturoiul, uleiul de măsline, vinul și o varietate de fructe de padure. Meniul francez tipic include o porție mică de mâncare de primul grad, un plat principal și un dulce. De asemenea, culinaria franceză este renumită pentru preparate precum ratatouille, bouillabaisse sau coq au vin.

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
Franța este cunoscută pentru o tradiție gastronomică bogată și variată. În cuisine franceză se găsesc influențe din diverse regiuni ale țării, precum Normandia, Provence, Languedoc și Burgundia. Acesta este caracterizat prin folosirea unui număr mare de ingrediente de calitate, în special carne, pescuit, legume și produse lăctate. Unul dintre cele mai cunoscute plăcinte franceze este croissantul, un pâine roșu aprinsă, croissantul, dar și celebra hamburger cu hacheură de carne. În general, cuisine franceză este cunoscută pentru precizia și soțurile sale excepționale, de la orezul parfait la sosurile bogate.

prompt:
Translate the following English text to Spanish:

"She whispered softly, knowing that some secrets are better left untold."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Here are a few ways to translate this, depending on the desired tone:

**Option 1: Natural/Literary (Recommended)**
> "Susurró suavemente, sabiendo que algunos secretos es mejor no contarlos."

**Option 2: More formal/Poetic**
> "Susurró en voz baja, sabiendo que hay secretos que es mejor dejar sin decir."

**Option 3: Direct/Simple**
> "Ella susurró suavemente, sabiendo que algunos secretos es mejor dejarlos sin contar."

**Key nuances:**
* **"Susurró suavemente"** is slightly redundant in Spanish (since whispering is inherently soft), but it perfectly captures the poetic emphasis of the original English sentence.
* **"No contarlos"** or **"dejarlos sin decir"** are the most natural ways to express "left untold."
gemma-4-26B-A4B.answer:

* **"No contarlos"** or **"dejarlos sin decir"** are the most natural ways to express "left untold."

prompt: Explica a história de Portugal. Responde em espanhol.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
La historia de Portugal es un relato fascinante de resistencia, navegación y formación de una identidad nacional única en la Península Ibérica. Para entenderla, podemos dividirla en varias etapas clave:

### 1. La Antigüedad y la Romanización
Antes de la formación de Portugal, el territorio estaba habitado por pueblos celtas y lusitanos (de ahí el nombre "Lusitania"). Con la llegada del **Imperio Romano**, la región fue integrada en la provincia de Lusitania. Los romanos dejaron un legado fundamental: el idioma (el latín que dio origen al portugués), el derecho, la arquitectura y el cristianismo.

### 2. La Invasión Germánica y la Reconquista
Tras la caída de Roma, los pueblos germánicos (como los suevos y luego los visigodos) ocuparon la región. Sin embargo, en el siglo VIII, la expansión musulmana llevó al control de casi toda la península.

La historia de Portugal como nación comienza con la **Reconquista Cristiana**. En el siglo IX, el Condado Portucalense se convirtió en una entidad política dentro del Reino de León.

### 3. La Fundación del Reino (Siglo XII)
El momento crucial ocurre en **1139**, cuando **Afonso Henriques**, tras luchar contra los moros y asegurar su independencia de León, se proclamó el primer Rey de Portugal. Su hija, Teresa, había negociado la autonomía, pero fue Afonso quien consolidó el reino. Portugal se convirtió así en uno de los estados-nación más antiguos de Europa.

### 4. La Era de los Descubrimientos (Siglos XV y XVI)
Este es el "Siglo de Oro" de Portugal. Gracias a su posición estratégica en el Atlántico y a avances en navegación (como la carabela), Portugal lideró la **Era de los Descubrimientos**.

*   **Enrique el Navegante** impulsó la exploración de la costa africana.
*   **Vasco da Gama** llegó a la India en 1498, abriendo una ruta comercial directa de especias.
*   **Pedro Álvares Cabral** llegó a Brasil en 1500.

Portugal construyó un imperio global que se extendía desde Brasil hasta África, la India y el sudeste asiático (Macao), convirtiéndose en una potencia mundial.

### 5

prompt: Apa itu demokratisasi? Jawab dalam bahasa Inggris.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
**Democratization** is the process of transitioning from an authoritarian or undemocratic political regime to a democratic one. It involves the expansion of political participation, the establishment of the rule of law, and the protection of individual rights and liberties.

The process typically involves several key elements:

1.  **Political Liberalization:** The relaxation of government restrictions on political activities, such as allowing more freedom of speech, press, and assembly.
2.  **Institutionalization:** The creation and strengthening of democratic institutions, such as independent judiciaries, fair electoral systems, and a multi-party system.
3.  **Popular Participation:** Increasing the involvement of citizens in the political process, most notably through regular, free, and fair elections.
4.  **Protection of Human Rights:** Ensuring that the rights of minorities and individuals are protected against the "tyranny of the majority" and government overreach.

Democratization can occur through various means, such as peaceful transitions (e.g., through social movements or reforms) or, in some cases, through more turbulent changes like revolutions.
gemma-4-26B-A4B.answer:
**Democratization** is the process of transitioning from an authoritarian or undemocratic political regime to a democratic one. It involves the expansion of political participation, the establishment of the rule of law, and the protection of individual rights and liberties.

The process typically involves several key elements:

1.  **Political Liberalization:** The relaxation of government restrictions on political activities, such as allowing more freedom of speech, press, and assembly.
2.  **Institutionalization:** The creation and strengthening of democratic institutions, such as independent judiciaries, fair electoral systems, and a multi-party system.
3.  **Popular Participation:** Increasing the involvement of citizens in the political process, most notably through regular, free, and fair elections.
4.  **Protection of Human Rights:** Ensuring that the rights of minorities and individuals are protected against the "tyranny of the majority" and government overreach.

Democratization can occur through various means, such as peaceful transitions (e.g., through social movements or reforms) or, in some cases, through more turbulent changes like revolutions.

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw: Democratization refers to the process by which a society transitions from an undemocratic or less democratic form of governance to a more democratic one. It involves the expansion of political rights, the establishment of democratic institutions, and the promotion of political participation among citizens. This process can include the establishment of free and fair elections, the protection of civil liberties, and the promotion of political equality.
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer: Democratization refers to the process by which a society transitions from an undemocratic or less democratic form of governance to a more democratic one. It involves the expansion of political rights, the establishment of democratic institutions, and the promotion of political participation among citizens. This process can include the establishment of free and fair elections, the protection of civil liberties, and the promotion of political equality.

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw: Demokratisasi adalah proses perubahan dari suatu sistem politik yang authoritarian atau totalitarian ke sistem politik yang lebih demokratis, yang memanfaatkan prinsip-prinsip seperti kebebasan, persadaban, transparansi, dan keadilan. Dalam sistem demokratis, wakil rakyat yang dipilih secara demokratis memiliki kekuasaan yang terbatas, dan wakil rakyat tersebut dapat menghapus president atau lider politik jika mereka menyuruh tindakan yang tidak diinginkan oleh rakyat. Demokratisasi juga melibatkan proses dalam meningkatkan hak-hak individu, seperti hak kebebasan, kebebasan untuk beragama, kebebasan politik, kebebasan ekonomi, dan kebebasan kekeluargaan.
Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.answer: Demokratisasi adalah proses perubahan dari suatu sistem politik yang authoritarian atau totalitarian ke sistem politik yang lebih demokratis, yang memanfaatkan prinsip-prinsip seperti kebebasan, persadaban, transparansi, dan keadilan. Dalam sistem demokratis, wakil rakyat yang dipilih secara demokratis memiliki kekuasaan yang terbatas, dan wakil rakyat tersebut dapat menghapus president atau lider politik jika mereka menyuruh tindakan yang tidak diinginkan oleh rakyat. Demokratisasi juga melibatkan proses dalam meningkatkan hak-hak individu, seperti hak kebebasan, kebebasan untuk beragama, kebebasan politik, kebebasan ekonomi, dan kebebasan kekeluargaan.

### 1. Die Ankunft der Magyaren und die Gründung des Staates (ca. 895–1000)
Die Magyaren (Ungarn) waren ein nomadisches Volk, das aus Richtung der Uralsregion in das Karpatenbecken einwanderte. Der entscheidende Wendepunkt war die Herrschaft von **István I. (Stephan I.)**. Er wandelte das Stammesbündnis in ein christliches Königreich um und wurde der erste König von Ungarn. Damit wurde Ungarn fest in die europäische Kultur integriert.

### 2. Das Königreich Ungarn und die Zeit der Árpáden (1000–1301)
In dieser Zeit festigte sich der Staat. Ungarn war eine bedeutende europäische Macht. Es gab jedoch auch schwierige Phasen, wie die Mongoleninvasion im Jahr 1241, die das Land schwer verwüstete. Unter den späteren Árpáden und den darauffolgenden Dynastien (wie den Anjou-Königen) erlebte das Land eine kulturelle und wirtschaftliche Blütezeit.

### 3. Die Ära der Habsburger und das Osmanische Reich (16. – 19. Jahrhundert)

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
Ich werde über die Geschichte Ungarns antworten. Ich bin hier, um Ihnen zu helfen.

Ungarn, auch Ungarn genannt, ist ein Land in Mittel- und Osteuropa. Es wird von den Karpatengebirgen im Norden und den Alpen im Westen umgrenzt. Die Hauptstadt Ungarns ist Budapest.

Die Geschichte Ungarns reicht bis ins 9. Jahrhundert zurück, als die Magyaren aus dem Gebiet des heutigen Russlands zogen und das ungarische Land besiedelten. In den folgenden Jahrhunderten wurde Ungarn von verschiedenen Mächten beherrscht, darunter die Mongolen und die Osmanen. Im Jahr 1526 erlitten die Ungarn eine schwere Niederlage gegen die Osmanen in der Schlacht bei Mohács und Ungarn wurde für mehr als 150 Jahre von der Osmanischen Expansion bedroht.

Im Jahr 1848 brachen in Ungarn die revolutionären Unruhen aus, in denen die ungarische Nation ihren Wunsch nach Unabhängigkeit von Österreich ausdrückte. Diese Revolution wurde niedergeschlagen und Ungarn wurde erneut Teil der österreichisch-ungarischen Monarchie.

Im Ersten Weltkrieg war Ungarn ein Verbündeter der Mittelmächte und verlor nach der Niederlage Teile seines Territoriums an das Königreich Rumänien und an das Königreich Serbien. Ungarn wurde im Friedensvertrag von Trianon gezwungen, einen großen Teil seines Territoriums an die Nachbarländer zu übergeben.

prompt:
Translate the following English text to French:

"This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the respective jurisdiction."

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
The most accurate translation for a legal context is:

**"Le présent contrat est régi par les lois de la juridiction respective."**

### Alternative variations depending on context:

* **If you want to sound more formal (standard in legal contracts):**
  *"Le présent accord est régi par les lois de la juridiction compétente."* (Note: "compétente" is often used in French legal texts to imply the relevant jurisdiction).
* **If "Agreement" refers to a specific treaty or convention:**
  *"Le présent accord est régi par les lois de la juridiction respective."*
* **Using "soumis à" (common in legal drafting):**
  *"Le présent contrat est soumis aux lois de la juridiction respective."*

**Key terminology used:**
* *This agreement:* Le présent contrat / Le présent accord
* *Shall be governed by:* Est régi par (In French legal writing, the present tense is used to express a mandatory requirement).
* *Laws:* Les lois
* *Respective jurisdiction:* La juridiction respective

Explica el sistema educativo en España brevemente.

El sistema educativo en España es público, gratuito (en sus etapas obligatorias) y está organizado en diferentes etapas según la edad de los alumnos. Se rige por leyes estatales, pero las Comunidades Autónomas tienen competencias para gestionarlo.

Aquí tienes un resumen de sus etapas principales:

### 1. Educación Infantil (0 a 6 años)
*   **Primer ciclo (0-3 años):** No es obligatorio y suele ser de pago (aunque existen plazas públicas).
*   **Segundo ciclo (3-6 años):** No es obligatorio, pero la gran mayoría de los niños asisten. Se centra en el desarrollo físico, emocional y social.

### 2. Educación Primaria (6 a 12 años)
*   **Carácter:** Es obligatoria y gratuita.
*   **Objetivo:** Desarrollar competencias básicas en lectura, escritura, matemáticas, conocimientos del medio y valores. Se divide en seis cursos académicos.

### 3. Educación Secundaria Obligatoria (ESO) (12 a 16 años)
*   **Carácter:** Es la última etapa de la educación obligatoria.
*   **Objetivo:** Los alumnos cursan cuatro años de estudio. Al finalizar, se obtiene el título de Graduado en ESO, que permite acceder a estudios superiores o a la formación profesional.

### 4. Educación Postobligatoria (16 años en adelante)
Una vez terminada la ESO, el alumno debe elegir entre dos vías principales:

*   **Bachillerato:** Dura dos años y tiene un carácter académico. Se prepara para acceder a la Universidad o a ciclos formativos de grado superior. Al terminar, los alumnos realizan la **EBAU** (o Selectividad), un examen necesario para entrar en la carrera universitaria.
*   **Formación Profesional (FP):** Es una vía más técnica y práctica. Se divide en:
    *   **Grado Medio:** Requiere haber terminado la ESO.
    *   **Grado Superior:** Requiere haber terminado el Bachillerato o un Grado Medio.

### 5. Educación Superior
*   **Universidad:** Ofrece grados (4 años habitualmente), másteres y doctorados.
*   **Enseñanzas Artísticas Superiores y Militares.**

prompt: Describe a strategy for OCR post-processing of multilingual documents containing English, Romanian, Hungarian, and Hebrew text. How do you handle script switching?

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
Post-processing OCR for a document containing Latin-script languages (English, Romanian, Hungarian) and a non-Latin script (Hebrew) is a high-complexity task. The primary challenge is not just error correction, but **segmentation** and **script identification**.

A successful strategy follows a pipeline of: **Detection $\rightarrow$ Segmentation $\rightarrow$ Language Identification $\rightarrow$ Language-Specific Correction.**

---

### 1. The Pre-Processing & Segmentation Stage
Before you can correct text, you must know which script you are looking at.

*   **Script Detection (The "Layout Analysis" approach):** Use a Deep Learning-based layout analyzer (like LayoutLM or a custom CNN) to detect text blocks. Instead of processing the whole page as one stream, segment the page into "text zones."
*   **Character-Level Script Identification:** Since Hebrew and Latin scripts look fundamentally different at the pixel level, use a lightweight script classifier (e.g., a small ResNet or a Tesseract-based script detector) to label text regions as `LATIN` or `HEBREW`.
*   **Handling Mixed-Script Lines:** If Hebrew and English appear on the same line (common in technical or bilingual manuals), you must use **Unicode Block Detection**. Once the OCR engine outputs raw text, analyze the Unicode ranges of each character. 
    *   `U+0590` to `U+05FF` $\rightarrow$ Hebrew.
    *   `U+0000` to `U+007F` $\rightarrow$ Basic Latin.

### 2. Handling Script Switching (The "Bi-Directional" Challenge)
The most difficult technical hurdle is the **BiDi (Bidirectional) algorithm**. Hebrew is Right-to-Left (RTL), while the others are Left-to-Right (LTR).

*   **Logical vs. Visual Order:** OCR engines often output "visual order" (the order characters appear on the page). You must apply the **Unicode Bidirectional Algorithm (UAX #9)** to reorder the Hebrew characters into "logical order" (the order they are read) while keeping English words in LTR order.
*   **The "Flip" Check:** When a line switches from Hebrew to English, the cursor direction changes. Your post-processor must ensure that punctuation (like periods or parentheses) attached to English words doesn't get "trapped" in

prompt:
[Respond in Portuguese]

Explica o sistema de saúde em Portugal resumidamente.

gemma-4-26B-A4B.raw:
O sistema de saúde em Portugal é estruturado de forma mista, mas o seu pilar principal é o **Serviço Nacional de Saúde (SNS)**. Aqui está um resumo dos seus componentes:

### 1. O Serviço Nacional de Saúde (SNS)
O SNS é um sistema público, universal e tendencialmente gratuito, gerido pelo Estado.
*   **Acesso:** Todos os cidadãos portugueses e residentes legais têm direito a ele.
*   **Funcionamento:** Baseia-se numa rede de cuidados primários (Centros de Saúde) e cuidados hospitalares. O primeiro ponto de contacto deve ser sempre o Médico de Família no Centro de Saúde.
*   **Custos:** Embora o ideal seja ser "tendencialmente gratuito", existem as chamadas **"taxas moderadoras"**. No entanto, na prática, a maioria das consultas e exames no SNS já está isenta de taxas para a maioria da população (doentes crónicos, crianças, idosos ou pessoas com baixos rendimentos).

### 2. O Setor Privado e Social
Devido às listas de espera que por vezes ocorrem no setor público, existe um setor complementar muito relevante:
*   **Setor Privado:** Composto por hospitais e clínicas particulares. O acesso é feito através do pagamento direto ou, mais comummente, através de **Seguros de Saúde** privados. É muito utilizado por quem procura rapidez e maior conforto.
*   **Setor Social (IPSS):** São instituições sem fins lucrativos (como a Misericórdia) que colaboram com o Estado na prestação de cuidados.

### 3. Como funciona na prática?
*   **Cuidados Primários:** Se estiver doente, deve dirigir-se ao seu **Centro de Saúde** para consultar o seu médico de família. Ele é o gestor do seu processo de saúde e decide se precisa de ser encaminhado para um especialista no hospital.
*   **Urgências:** Existem urgências nos hospitais públicos (para casos graves) e em hospitais privados. Em caso de emergência extrema, liga-se para o **112** (número de emergência) ou para a **Linha SNS 24 (808 24 24 24)**, que faz a triagem telefónica para evitar que as urgências fiquem sobrecarregadas.

**Em resumo:**

Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.raw:
O sistema de saúde em Portugal é um sistema público e universal, conhecido como Serviço Nacional de Saúde (SNS). Ele é financiado principalmente através de impostos e visa fornecer assistência médica a todos os cidadãos, independentemente de suas condições econômicas. O SNS oferece uma variedade de serviços, incluindo atendimento ambulatorial, hospitalar e de saúde pública. 

Além disso, o sistema permite que os cidadãos complementem o atendimento público com planos de saúde privados, se desejarem. O SNS tem sido elogiado por sua abordagem equitativa, mas enfrenta desafios relacionados a recursos, incluindo falta de pessoal e equipamentos em certos momentos.
Qwen2.5-14B-Instruct.answer:
O sistema de saúde em Portugal é um sistema público e universal, conhecido como Serviço Nacional de Saúde (SNS). Ele é financiado principalmente através de impostos e visa fornecer assistência médica a todos os cidadãos, independentemente de suas condições econômicas. O SNS oferece uma variedade de serviços, incluindo atendimento ambulatorial, hospitalar e de saúde pública. 

Além disso, o sistema permite que os cidadãos complementem o atendimento público com planos de saúde privados, se desejarem. O SNS tem sido elogiado por sua abordagem equitativa, mas enfrenta desafios relacionados a recursos, incluindo falta de pessoal e equipamentos em certos momentos.

Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.3.raw:
O sistema de saúde em Portugal é organizado pelo Serviço Nacional de Saúde (SNS), que é financiado pelo sistema de seguro de saúde obrigatório. Este sistema é administrado pelo Ministério da Saúde e tem como objetivo garantir acesso universal à assistência de saúde para todos os portugueses.

O SNS é dividido em três níveis de atendimento:

1. Atendimento Primário: este nível inclui clínicas familiares, farmácias, laboratórios, centros de saúde e serviços de emergência.
2. Atendimento Secundário: este nível é constituído por hospitales gerais, hospitais especializados, unidades de diagnóstico e terapia intensiva e hospitais regionais.
3. Atendimento Tertiário: este nível inclui hospitais universitários e centros de transplante.

Além do SNS, existem outras entidades de saúde como a Assistência Privada de Saúde (APS) e a Assistência à Saúde de Utilizadores (ASU), que são opções de seguro de saúde privadas para aqueles que desejam ter acesso a um nível de cuidado mais elevado.

A Portugal também tem um sistema de saúde pública, o Instituto de Saúde Pública (ISP), que é responsável por monitorar e controlar doenças infecciosas, alimentares e ambientais, bem como promover a saúde

Além do SNS, existem outras entidades de saúde como a Assistência Privada de Saúde (APS) e a Assistência à Saúde de Utilizadores (ASU), que são opções de seguro de saúde privadas para aqueles que desejam ter acesso a um nível de cuidado mais elevado.

A Portugal também tem um sistema de saúde pública, o Instituto de Saúde Pública (ISP), que é responsável por monitorar e controlar doenças infecciosas, alimentares e ambientais, bem como promover a saúde

* **אם רק (Im rak):** If only
* **מסתכלים (Mistaklim):** [One] looks
* **מספיק חזק (Maspik chazak):** Hard enough / strongly enough
